title: OpenAI’s agents hit 10 million users as ChatGPT Work push accelerates
summary: OpenAI says the agentic side of ChatGPT has passed 10 million weekly users, a mark it reached less than two weeks after the debut of ChatGPT Work , its attempt to turn the chatbot into a tool that finishes a job rather…
